---
title: "Supporting Information"
subtitle: "Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio as a Head-Size-Independent Biomarker: Sex Differences and Cognitive Associations in 27,680 UK Biobank Participants"
author:
  - name: Sofia Fernandez-Lozano
    affiliations:
      - ref: bic
      - ref: ipn
  - name: D. Louis Collins
    affiliations:
      - ref: bic
      - ref: ipn
      - ref: bbme
    email: louis.collins@mcgill.ca
    corresponding: true
affiliations:
  - id: bic
    name: McConnell Brain Imaging Centre
    department: Montreal Neurological Institute
    city: Montreal
    state: Quebec
    country: Canada
  - id: ipn
    name: McGill University
    department: Department of Neurology and Neurosurgery
    city: Montreal
    state: Quebec
    country: Canada
  - id: bbme
    name: McGill University
    department: Department of Biomedical Engineering
    city: Montreal
    state: Quebec
    country: Canada
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .gt_table, .gt_table th, .gt_table td {
          font-size: 14px !important;
        }
        table, th, td {
          font-size: 14px !important;
        }
        </style>
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    latex-max-runs: 20
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{amsmath}
        \usepackage{amssymb}
        \usepackage{textcomp}
        \usepackage{fontspec}
        \setmainfont{Latin Modern Roman}
        \usepackage{newunicodechar}
        \newunicodechar{ε}{\ensuremath{\varepsilon}}
        % Center longtables
        \setlength{\LTleft}{\fill}
        \setlength{\LTright}{\fill}
        % Supplementary numbering: Table S1, Figure S1, etc.
        \renewcommand{\thetable}{S\arabic{table}}
        \renewcommand{\thefigure}{S\arabic{figure}}
        % Force exact placement so floats don't drift
        \usepackage{float}
        \floatplacement{table}{H}
        \floatplacement{figure}{H}
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  eval: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Activate renv (quarto runs R with --vanilla, skipping .Rprofile)
renv::load(file.path(getwd(), ".."))

library(here)
library(data.table)
library(gt)
here::i_am("reports-src/supplementary.qmd")
source(here("reports-src/_common.R"))

# Load pre-computed manuscript environment (from R/12_manuscript_objects.R)
ms <- read_rds_safe(here("data/derivatives/manuscript_env.rds"), "manuscript environment")
list2env(ms$scalars, envir = environment())
list2env(ms$data, envir = environment())
list2env(ms$tables, envir = environment())
```

# Supplementary Tables {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-cog-battery
#| tbl-cap: "**Cognitive test battery.** UK Biobank imaging visit assessments with field identifiers."

cog_battery <- data.table(
  Domain = c("Memory", "Memory", "Memory",
             "Processing Speed", "Processing Speed", "Processing Speed",
             "Executive Function",
             "Reasoning", "Reasoning", "Reasoning",
             "Verbal", "Numeric"),
  Test = c("Pairs Matching (round 1)", "Pairs Matching (round 2)", "Prospective Memory",
           "Reaction Time", "Symbol Digit Substitution", "Trail Making A",
           "Trail Making B",
           "Fluid Intelligence", "Matrix Reasoning", "Tower Rearranging",
           "Vocabulary", "Numeric Memory"),
  `UK Biobank Field` = c("399", "400", "20018",
                         "20023", "20159", "6348",
                         "6350",
                         "20016", "6373", "21004",
                         "6364", "4282"),
  Description = c("Number of errors in visual memory task",
                  "Number of errors in delayed recall",
                  "Correct execution of delayed instruction",
                  "Mean response time (ms)",
                  "Number correct in 60 seconds",
                  "Time to complete (s)",
                  "Time to complete (s)",
                  "Number correct in 13 verbal-numerical items",
                  "Number correct in non-verbal reasoning",
                  "Planning task score",
                  "Number of synonyms identified",
                  "Maximum digit span")
)

cog_battery |>
  gt(groupname_col = "Domain") |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Cognitive Test Battery",
    subtitle = "UK Biobank imaging visit assessments"
  ) |>
  cols_label(`UK Biobank Field` = "Field ID") |>
  gt_pdf_style()
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-covariates-fields
#| tbl-cap: "**SEM model covariates.** UK Biobank field identifiers. Age² included in HVR and HC-RES models only. IMDP available for England subsample only. Site modeled as random effect in GAMLSS; cluster-robust SE in pooled SEM."

data.table(
  Variable = c("Age", "Age²", "ICV", "IMDP", "Education", "Site"),
  Description = c(
    "Age at imaging visit (years)",
    "Quadratic age term",
    "Intracranial volume (cc)",
    "Index of Multiple Deprivation",
    "Educational attainment (years)",
    "UK Biobank assessment centre"
  ),
  Field_ID = c(
    "21003",
    "Derived",
    "Derived",
    "26410",
    "6138",
    "54"
  )
) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Variable") |>
  cols_label(
    Description = "Description",
    Field_ID = "UK Biobank Field"
  ) |>
  tab_header(title = "SEM Model Covariates") |>
  gt_pdf_style()
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-temporal-stability
#| tbl-cap: "**Test-retest reliability of brain measures.** Mean follow-up interval of 2.7 years (SD = 1.1). N = 2,935 participants with both ses-2 and ses-3 imaging. ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient (two-way, absolute agreement); not to be confused with ICV (intracranial volume)."

if (!is.null(stability_dt)) {
  stability_dt |>
    gt(groupname_col = "ROI") |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(`Pearson r`, ICC), decimals = 3) |>
    tab_header(title = "Temporal Stability of Brain Measures") |>
    gt_pdf_style()
} else {
  gt(data.table(Message = "Longitudinal data not available")) |>
    tab_header(title = "Temporal Stability")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hvr-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "**HVR normative centiles for females.** Values by hemisphere at 5-year age intervals for clinical reference."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HVR", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "HVR Normative Centiles: Females (by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hvr-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "**HVR normative centiles for males.** Values by hemisphere at 5-year age intervals for clinical reference."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HVR", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "HVR Normative Centiles: Males (by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hc-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "**HC normative centiles for females.** Values by hemisphere (ICV-controlled). Given significant lateralization (right HC > left HC in females), hemisphere-specific norms are provided."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HC", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "HC Normative Centiles: Females (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hc-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "**HC normative centiles for males.** Values by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HC", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "HC Normative Centiles: Males (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-lv-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "**LV normative centiles for females.** Values by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "LV", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "LV Normative Centiles: Females (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-lv-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "**LV normative centiles for males.** Values by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "LV", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "LV Normative Centiles: Males (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-gamlss-hvr-coef
#| tbl-cap: "**GAMLSS coefficients for HVR.** Transfer model without site. $\\mu$ = location (mean), $\\sigma$ = scale (variance), $\\nu$ = skewness. Bold indicates p < .05."

if (!is.null(hvr_coefs)) {
  format_gamlss_coef_gt(hvr_coefs, title = "GAMLSS Model: Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio (HVR)")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-gamlss-hc-coef
#| tbl-cap: "**GAMLSS coefficients for HC volume.** Transfer model without site. $\\mu$ = location (mean), $\\sigma$ = scale (variance), $\\nu$ = skewness. Bold indicates p < .05."

if (!is.null(hc_coefs)) {
  format_gamlss_coef_gt(hc_coefs, title = "GAMLSS Model: Hippocampal Volume (HC)")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-measurement-invariance
#| tbl-cap: "**Measurement invariance testing.** Cognitive bifactor model. Delta-CFI and Delta-RMSEA within recommended thresholds at each step supports strict invariance."
format_minv_gt(cfa_minv)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-paths-by-sex
#| tbl-cap: "**Brain-cognition paths by sex.** $\\beta$ = standardized coefficient. Bold indicates p < .05. Multi-group SEM with sex-stratified parameter estimation."
format_sem_paths_by_sex_gt(sem_params)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-fit
#| tbl-cap: "**SEM model fit indices.** Pooled models include sex as covariate; sex-stratified models estimate parameters separately. The HC (unadjusted) model uses a linear age term only; quadratic age was excluded due to multicollinearity between HC, ICV, and age². Good fit: CFI/TLI > 0.95, RMSEA < 0.06, SRMR < 0.08."
if (!is.null(sem_fit_dt)) {
  format_sem_fit_gt(sem_fit_dt)
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-loadings
#| tbl-cap: "**Factor loadings by sex.** $\\lambda$ = standardized loading; SE = standard error. Bold indicates p < .05. Loadings constrained to 1.0 for scale identification not shown. Memory-Specific factor showed estimation failure in females and non-significant loadings in males (factor collapse); see Limitations."

if (!is.null(loadings_dt) && nrow(loadings_dt) > 0) {
  format_sem_loadings_gt(loadings_dt, model_name = "HVR Model")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-covariate-effects
#| tbl-cap: "**SEM covariate effects on cognition.** $\\beta$ = standardized coefficient; SE = standard error. Bold indicates p < .05. Memory-Specific factor not shown due to factor collapse."

format_sem_covariates_gt(covar_dt, model_name = "HVR Model")
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-site-adjusted
#| tbl-cap: "**Site-adjusted sex difference effect sizes.** ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient indicating proportion of variance attributable to site."
if ("SITE_ADJUSTED" %in% names(sex_diff))
  format_site_adjusted_gt(sex_diff$SITE_ADJUSTED)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hemisphere
#| tbl-cap: "**Sex differences by hemisphere.** HC/LV = ICV-residualized; HVR = self-normalizing ratio. d = Cohen's d (positive = females > males)."
hemi_dt <- get_hemisphere_comparison(sex_diff)
if (!is.null(hemi_dt) && nrow(hemi_dt) > 0)
  format_hemisphere_gt(hemi_dt)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sensitivity
#| tbl-cap: "**Sensitivity to psychiatric exclusions.** Sensitivity sample includes participants with ICD-10 F00-F99 diagnoses. $\\Delta$d = difference in Cohen's d; values near zero indicate robust findings."
sens_dt <- get_sensitivity_comparison(sex_diff)
if (!is.null(sens_dt) && nrow(sens_dt) > 0)
  format_sensitivity_gt(sens_dt)
```

\clearpage

# Supplementary Figures {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-distributions
#| fig-cap: "**Distribution overlap by sex.** Across adjustment methods. Left column: full sample. Right column: head-size matched sample (age $\\pm 1$ year, intracranial volume $\\pm 25$ cc)."
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 7
fig_distribution_overlap(brain_data, matched_brain_data, show_matched = TRUE)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-gamlss-calibration
#| fig-cap: "**GAMLSS normative model calibration.** Points represent observed vs. expected proportions in held-out test data. Diagonal line indicates perfect calibration."
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 3.5

if (!is.null(gamlss_calib)) {
  fig_gamlss_validation_combined(gamlss_calib)
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-hemisphere
#| fig-cap: "**Hemisphere comparison of sex differences.** Faded error bars indicate non-significant effects. Right panel shows the right minus left difference with 95% confidence interval, colored by overall sex advantage direction (red = female advantage, blue = male advantage; faded = non-significant difference)."
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| dev: cairo_pdf
fig_hemisphere_comparison(sex_diff)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-sensitivity
#| fig-cap: "**Sensitivity analysis for psychiatric exclusions.** Faded points indicate non-significant effects. Right panel shows the primary minus sensitivity difference with 95% confidence interval."
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4.7
#| dev: cairo_pdf
fig_sensitivity_comparison(sex_diff)
```
